items.reason: Path is a portable-looking configuration file.

findings.message: MCP server "demo" runs a package executor without an obvious pinned package version.
findings.recommended_action: Replace unversioned or @latest package references with a reviewed explicit version.
findings.impact: Unsafe portable config can expose secrets, stale local state, or unexpected agent capabilities.
findings.why_this_matters: AI agent and MCP configuration often sits in dotfiles and sync folders, so local-only values can leak or break on another machine.
findings.fix_summary: Replace unversioned or @latest package references with a reviewed explicit version.
fix_steps: Replace unversioned or @latest package references with a reviewed explicit version.
Re-run Nightward and compare the next report.

findings.message: MCP server "demo" references a sensitive environment key.
findings.recommended_action: Keep secret values outside dotfiles and document required env names only.
findings.impact: Unsafe portable config can expose secrets, stale local state, or unexpected agent capabilities.
findings.why_this_matters: AI agent and MCP configuration often sits in dotfiles and sync folders, so local-only values can leak or break on another machine.
findings.fix_summary: Keep secret values outside dotfiles and document required env names only.
fix_steps: Keep secret values outside dotfiles and document required env names only.
Re-run Nightward and compare the next report.

findings.message: MCP server "demo" appears to reference broad filesystem access.
findings.recommended_action: Narrow filesystem arguments to explicit project or vault directories.
findings.impact: Unsafe portable config can expose secrets, stale local state, or unexpected agent capabilities.
findings.why_this_matters: AI agent and MCP configuration often sits in dotfiles and sync folders, so local-only values can leak or break on another machine.
findings.fix_summary: Narrow filesystem arguments to explicit project or vault directories.
fix_steps: Narrow filesystem arguments to explicit project or vault directories.
Re-run Nightward and compare the next report.

findings.message: Review MCP server "demo" before syncing this config.
findings.recommended_action: Confirm this server is intentional and safe for the target machine before syncing.
findings.impact: Unsafe portable config can expose secrets, stale local state, or unexpected agent capabilities.
